parameters.query:
SELECT tc.access_token, array_to_json(array_agg(json_build_object('category_id', c.category_id, 'category_name', c.category_name))) AS categories
FROM config.temu_credentials tc
CROSS JOIN catalogs.categories c
WHERE tc.app_key = 'db98a65eba39bf6886faf56e9249589e'
  AND c.marketplace = 'temu_ro'
  AND c.is_active = true
GROUP BY tc.access_token;
